{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Cult of the Weeping Dragon
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Cult of the Weeping Dragon]] includes a [[Stormcaller]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
